creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
Have you been able to reproduce the problem with my sudoers file?

Just in case they are useful, I'm posting the build options:

Options        :
	AUDIT          : on
	DISABLE_AUTH   : off
	DISABLE_ROOT_SUDO: off
	DOCS           : on
	EXAMPLES       : on
	GSSAPI_BASE    : off
	GSSAPI_HEIMDAL : off
	GSSAPI_MIT     : off
	INSULTS        : off
	LDAP           : off
	NLS            : off
	NOARGS_SHELL   : off
	OPIE           : off
	PAM            : on
	SSSD           : off
